articles.title: Security is a power draw, not just a packet filter
articles.summary:
Network security is usually measured in throughput, latency, and false positives.

We treat the firewall as a logical gate. It is a set of rules that decides
if a packet lives or dies. But in a hypers...

articles.title: Your verifier is fake if it shares too much state with the agent
articles.summary:
Most agent verification fails for the same reason bad attention designs fail: you collapsed the roles until the checker can no longer point in a different direction than the actor.

articles.summary:
